title: Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir
tagline: Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Lodheshwar Mahadev Temple is a Hindu temple of Shiva, located in village Mahadeva, Ram Nagar tehsil in Barabanki district, Uttar Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Lodheshwar Mahadev Temple is a Hindu temple of Shiva, located in village Mahadeva, Ram Nagar tehsil in Barabanki district, Uttar Pradesh, India. The deity of Shivling worshiped in this temple is one of the rarest of the 52 Shivlings found on the Shakti Pithas across India. This ancient temple has been mentioned several times in Mahabharat. Lodheshwar Mahadev is Kuldevta of Lodhi Rajputs.

topPlaces.name: Mahadeva, Barabanki
topPlaces.description: Mahadeva is a village in tehsil Ram Nagar of Barabanki district on the banks of river Ghaghra. Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir an age-old temple of Shiva is located at the village.

topPlaces.name: Ramnagar, Barabanki
topPlaces.description: Ramnagar is a town in Barabanki district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. It is a town, tehsil and a nagar panchayat in Barabanki District in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Elgin Bridge (Barabanki)
topPlaces.description: Elgin Bridge is a 3,695 feet (1,126 m) long railway bridge across the Ghaghra River located in Barabanki district. The bridge falls on the Barabanki-Gonda section of the North Eastern Railway zone of Indian Railways.

topPlaces.name: Kintoor
topPlaces.description: Kintoor, Kantur or Kintur is a village in the Barabanki district of the Awadh region of central Uttar Pradesh, India. It is famous for the Battle of Kintoor of 1858 during the Indian Mutiny and being home to the learned Sayyids of Awadh, Northern India.

items.note: Mahadeva is a village in tehsil Ram Nagar of Barabanki district on the banks of river Ghaghra. Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir an age-old temple of Shiva is located at the village.
Ramnagar is a town in Barabanki district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. It is a town, tehsil and a nagar panchayat in Barabanki District in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

Elgin Bridge is a 3,695 feet (1,126 m) long railway bridge across the Ghaghra River located in Barabanki district. The bridge falls on the Barabanki-Gonda section of the North Eastern Railway zone of Indian Railways.

Kintoor, Kantur or Kintur is a village in the Barabanki district of the Awadh region of central Uttar Pradesh, India. It is famous for the Battle of Kintoor of 1858 during the Indian Mutiny and being home to the learned Sayyids of Awadh, Northern India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Lucknow Charbagh (63 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lodheshwar Mahadev Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mahadeva, Barabanki, Ramnagar, Barabanki, Elgin Bridge (Barabanki), Kintoor.
